title: Seven new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta July 1
summary: On July 1, YKHC reports seven new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta. New COVID-19 Cases The 7 residents are in: Alakanuk (1) Bethel (2) Eek (1) Kwethluk (2) St. Mary’s (1) — COVID-19 Updates and Community Information Vaccinations: YKHC strongly encourages everyone 6 months and older to get vaccinate...

title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: June 30, 2022
summary: June 30, 2022: Over the past week, the sea ice has now decreased by a slightly lower rate of 5.08% from the level on 06/23/2022 of 10.214 M km 2 to 9.695 M km 2 for this week. title: The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of June 27, 2022
summary: Take Five is The Arctic Institute's weekly redux on the Arctic's most important stories, published every Friday. The post The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of June 27, 2022 appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .

title: End-of-June Wildfires
summary: Alaska wildfires are spreading at a rapid pace. There have been 365 fires confirmed by the end of June 2022 (ref.: Alaska Interagency Coordination Center Wildland Fire Dashboard). Almost 1.8 Mio acres have burned, which exceeds the end-of-June acreage of any record fire year (i.e. 2004, 2005) to dat...
